content.introduction: Polymarket has partnered with Chainalysis to enhance on-chain surveillance, aiming to detect and prevent insider trading and market manipulation. This collaboration leverages Chainalysis's data infrastructure to ensure market integrity. The initiative supports Polymarket's compliance efforts following its 2022 settlement with the CFTC.
body: Polymarket partners with Chainalysis to boost on-chain surveillance , targeting insider trading and manipulation as regulatory pressure rises.

Polymarket announced Thursday that it has partnered with blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis to deploy an on-chain monitoring system to strengthen market integrity across its prediction platform. The firm will integrate Chainalysis’s data infrastructure and investigative tools to detect and remove insider trading, fraud and other forms of market manipulation. The initiative is designed to enforce Polymarket’s Market Integrity Rules while leveraging the transparency of blockchain-based trading. ## **Polymarket to strengthen compliance with Chainalysis tools**. At the core of the system is a detection model built on Chainalysis Data Solutions, designed to flag trading patterns consistent with the use of non-public or insider information. By combining a transparent market structure with advanced analytics, Polymarket said it aims to establish a benchmark for trust and accountability in on-chain financial markets. The announcement comes as Polymarket continues efforts to re-establish a regulated presence in the US following its 2022 settlement with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), which led to its exit from the market.
Polymarket said the Chainalysis partnership will help enforce market integrity rules through on-chain monitoring and anomaly detection. The
